After a harrowing plane crash, Special Forces officer James Belmont (Brad Pitt) and his combat dog, Odin, find themselves stranded deep in the Alaskan wilderness. snippet.title: Whalefall | Official Teaser | In Theaters October 16
snippet.description:
The odds of being swallowed alive by a whale are not zero.

Watch the new teaser for #Whalefall and see the film only in theaters October 16.

Following the death of his father (Josh Brolin), Jay Gardiner (Austin Abrams) goes diving off the central Coast of California in search of his remains, but is swallowed by a massive sperm whale. While trapped inside its belly with only one hour of oxygen left, Jay comes to realize that the hard-earned lessons his father imparted may be the key to his escape.

snippet.title: Tribby Wadi Bhozza - Menateng [Feat. Patron West, Gallarbass & Stellenbosch] (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Tribby Wadi Bhozza presents the official music video to Menateng, featuring Patron West, Gallarbass & Stellenbosch.

Available to Stream / Download: http://africori.to/kasiflavour.oyd

“Menateng” is a high-energy lekompo anthem that captures the raw spirit of groove culture, street confidence, and unapologetic self-assertion. Produced by Gallarbass & Stellenbosch, the track rides on a hard-hitting, percussive lekompo bounce layered with infectious log drums and commanding chant-style hooks designed for outdoor groove settings.

The song opens with Patron West setting the tone in the first verses, celebrating freedom through dance and the communal experience of “menateng,” a colloquial expression that evokes going out to groove, having fun, and living in the moment. His delivery blends playful charisma with social commentary, as he reflects on superficial relationships within groove culture. He touches on the reality of being undervalued or only sought after for material benefit, particularly when people engage with you merely for free alcohol or convenience. The subtext critiques opportunistic behavior while maintaining a danceable, feel-good cadence.

Tribby Wadi Bhozza then enters with a commanding presence, shifting the thematic direction toward dominance and longevity in the lekompo scene. His verses assert his position at the top of the genre, reinforcing that his success is neither accidental nor temporary. He challenges detractors and doubters directly, emphasizing that he has always proclaimed his ambition from a young age and is now living it out unapologetically. The phrase “piki piki mabelani” becomes a symbolic declaration of forward motion, a metaphor for progression and elevation. Those who cannot keep up are free to remain behind.

Overall, “Menateng” balances celebratory groove energy with bold self-affirmation. It is both a dancefloor record and a statement piece, addressing loyalty, resilience, and permanence within the evolving lekompo landscape while remaining rooted in the vibrant culture of outdoor groove.

#lekompo, #Tribbywadibhozza, #Menateng
